prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on the Geometric Brownian Motion model. Historical daily adjusted close prices for LOW over the past ~1 year (251 trading days) were used to estimate the average daily log return (drift: 0.000621) and daily volatility (standard deviation of log returns: 0.013582). The point estimate represents the median expected price after 20 trading days. Confidence intervals are calculated using these estimated parameters and corresponding Z-scores for a log-normal distribution, assuming that historical price movements and volatility are indicative of future trends over the specified short period.
